### Consumer
At Bessemer, we believe the future is built by creators, curators, community leaders, and co-owners. As commerce and communities transform on and off line, new distribution channels are emerging and our world is changing how we all connect, shop, and play. We back audacious founders, across internet marketplaces, gaming, creator tools, and more, enabling and empowering today’s hybrid reality.
[Explore Consumer Roadmap](https://www.bvp.com/consumer)

### Crypto
We’re now in the early innings of the next shift: a new iteration and ecosystem of the web built on blockchain technology with several decades of transformation ahead of it. With [$250 million in dedicated funding](https://www.bvp.com/news/forging-the-decentralized-future-bessemer-s-commitment-to-web3), we’re excited to invest and support the audacious founders and teams building the decentralized future with a focus on consumer applications, DeFi, web3 infrastructure, and enabling technology
[Explore Crypto Roadmap](https://www.bvp.com/crypto-and-web3)

Cybersecurity is finally taking its rightful place at the center stage of the global business and geopolitical landscape. Just a few short years since data privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA came into play, the international community has seen some of the most high profile attacks make their mark in the media and the boardroom. The emergence of new categories, the quick pace of change, and CISOs’ increased willingness to purchase security from startups, makes it more feasible than ever for a tiny startup to scale into a new cyber giant.

##  What is foundersbase?
Foundersbase is a networking platform where startup founders connect with co-founders, entrepreneurial talent, and early supporters to build their ventures.   
  
Members from all over the world create profiles, showcase their startup projects, and engage in direct conversations to form a founding team, find advisors and investors, or recruit startup hires.   
  
Unlike broad networking sites, Foundersbase is specifically designed for founder's needs and uses advanced profile curation technology to ensure that every connection is relevant - whether you're looking for a tech co-founder, a marketing expert, or someone to invest early support in your idea.
[ Join us today! ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup)

## Where AI Meets Real-World Marketing for Real-World Businesses
## Plan smarter. Execute faster. Grow with AI-powered marketing systems built for real businesses like yours.
[ Get Your Free AI Funnel Audit ](https://go.digitalmarketer.com/ai-powered-marketing-audit)
## It’s fast, it’s free, and it could save you thousands in lost leads.
Trusted by over 125,000  | worldwide
## Why Your Funnel Isn’t Converting Like It Should
## Most marketers are running traffic to broken funnels. Here’s where the leaks happen... and why most fixes don’t stick.
###  You’re Guessing at the Strategy 
Without a clear customer journey, your campaigns feel scattered and your conversions reflect it. 
###  Your Messaging Doesn’t Hit 
Most funnels focus on what you want to say, not what your customer needs to hear. That disconnect kills conversion.
